name: Dinner Rolls, Bread Machine Style
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all dough ingredients in the bread pan in the order listed. Select SWEET DOUGH cycle.
2. Grease a cookie sheet. Divide dough into 15 pieces. Shape each piece into ball.
3. Place the balls 2 inches apart on the cookie sheet. Brush with margarine.
4. Cover; let rise 30 to 40 minutes or until double in size.
5. Preheat oven to 375°F.
6. Bake for 12 to 15 minutes or until golden brown, brushing tops with margarine if desired.
